subcodes.title: Words to Nuru'd-Din Mumtazi et al in May 1920
subcodes.first_line: At present rocks and thornbushes surround the Shrine of the Bab, but in the future this place will be encompassed by an abundance of trees and flowers
subcodes.first_line_orig: سنگلاخ های این کوه مبدل به گل و ریاحین خواهد شد و گردش گاه ملل
subcodes.subjects: @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @Shrines and Holy places, @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @predictions and prophecies
